name: Vietnamese Pork Bowls
description: A quick caramelized pork bowl with fish sauce and brown sugar, served over rice with fresh toppings.
recipeIngredient: 0.5 onion, finely diced (brown, white, or yellow)
1 bird's eye or Thai chili, deseeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions: Heat cooking oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat. Add onion and cook until softened.
Add ginger, garlic, and chili. Cook for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Add ground pork and break it up. Cook until browned and cooked through.
Add brown sugar and fish sauce. Stir to combine and cook until the pork is caramelized and the sauce has thickened.
Serve over rice, topped with sliced green onion, red chilli, tomato, and cucumber.
